title: Redis Key-Value Entry
description: A Redis key and its associated value, type, and metadata.

key.description: The Redis key. Keys are arbitrary binary-safe strings, conventionally namespaced with colons (e.g., user:1234:profile).

type.description: The Redis data type for this key.

value.description: The value stored at this key. Type depends on the Redis data type.

ttl.description: Time-to-live in seconds. -1 means no expiry. -2 means the key does not exist.

encoding.description: Internal Redis encoding for the value (e.g., embstr, raw, ziplist, listpack, skiplist, quicklist, hashtable).
